mapper.insert: INSERT INTO push_subscription (user_id, kind, token, p256dh, auth, user_agent, last_used_at) SELECT u.id, #{kind}, #{token}, #{p256dh}, #{auth}, #{userAgent}, NOW() FROM users u WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND u.status = 'ACTIVE' ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_id = VALUES(user_id), kind = VALUES(kind), p256dh = VALUES(p256dh), auth = VALUES(auth), user_agent = VALUES(user_agent), last_used_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT ps.* FROM push_subscription ps JOIN users u ON u.id = ps.user_id AND u.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE ps.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ps.id DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM push_subscription WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND token = #{token}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM push_subscription ps JOIN users u ON u.id = ps.user_id AND u.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE ps.user_id = #{userId}
